items.title: How Trump's credit card rate cap would impact Visa & Mastercard
items.description: President Trump has proposed implementing a 10% cap on credit card interest rates. Argus Research director of financial services research Stephen Biggar sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to explain how Trump's rate cap would affect names like Visa (V) and Mastercard (MA). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: Does Lemon's Bitcoin Credit Card Hint at V's Next Crypto Growth Lane?
items.description: A Bitcoin-backed credit card on Visa's network lets users spend pesos while holding crypto, highlighting a new path for crypto-linked credit growth.

items.title: Is Visa Inc Gaining or Losing Market Support?
The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Visa, Advanced Micro Devices and Thermo Fisher Scientific
items.description: Visa, AMD and Thermo Fisher Scientific headline Zacks' top analyst reports, spotlighting digital payments strength, AI-driven chip demand and life-sciences innovation.

items.title: Trump Is Taking Aim at Credit Card Swipe Fees. Should You Ditch Visa Stock ASAP?
items.description: V stock is under pressure as political scrutiny of swipe fees resurfaces, but Visa’s fundamentals tell a more nuanced story.
